inputs.label: Number of Failures
inputs.businessContext: Total observed failures during monitoring period

inputs.label: Total Calendar Time
inputs.businessContext: Total elapsed time in hours (e.g., 8760 h/year)

inputs.label: Number of Units
inputs.businessContext: Number of units under test or in operation

inputs.label: Duty Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of time units are actually operating

outputs.primary: Failure Rate: ${failureRateFPMH.toFixed(2)} failures per million hours
breakdown: FIT Rate: ${failureRateFIT.toFixed(2)} failures per billion hours
